title: orobanche corymbosa subsp. corymbosa
intro: Orobanche corymbosa subsp. corymbosa, also known as the Himalayan broomrape, is a parasitic plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Orobanche corymbosa subsp. corymbosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Himalayan region to treat various ailments.
